Linear's current focus is the full deployment loop — Linear Releases shipped in late April as a first-class CI/CD integration.

![Issue sidebar showing a progression of iOS releases](https://webassets.linear.app/images/ornj730p/production/ebc92422119e3015828e065d89dee22185e53a1a-3600x1760.png?q=95&auto=format&dpr=2)

**Linear Agent reaches outside Linear for context.**

- Connects to Granola, Glean, Notion, and PostHog for meeting notes, enterprise context, and analytics
- Workspace admins gate access with allowlists
- Triage automations and the skills system shipped in March
- Linear announced Code Intelligence (codebase Q&A) for Business and Enterprise

**Microsoft Teams joined the integration surface.**

- `@Linear` mentions inside any Teams channel can file bugs, query projects, or create issues from video transcripts
- Custom coding-tool launchers extend deeplinks to Amp, Devin, Factory, Warp, and Windsurf

**Linear's MCP server exposes more workspace data to agents (breaking endpoint change).**

- Initiatives, project-milestones, and updates are now queryable
- Comments support pagination
- OAuth connections survive past the prior ~1-day disconnect bug
- Endpoints moved from `https://mcp.linear.app/sse` to `https://mcp.linear.app/mcp`

**Organizational structure deepened.**

- Teams nest up to five levels with inherited workflows
- Projects and initiatives gained comment threads alongside formal updates
